---
title: "SimiCPipeline"
description: "Python package for phenotype-specific GRN inference and Regulon Activity Score (RAS) calculation."
---

<style>
.quarto-title-block .title {
  color: var(--simic-purple);
}
</style>

SimiCPipeline is the Python component of SimiC-Suite. It supports phenotype-specific gene regulatory network (GRN) inference from single-cell RNA-seq data and calculation of Regulon Activity Score (RAS) values for downstream interpretation.

SimiCPipeline builds on the SimiC framework for phenotype-aware regulatory network analysis. Please cite the original SimiC work when using SimiCPipeline where appropriate.

[View SimiCPipeline on GitHub](https://github.com/ML4BM-Lab/SimiCPipeline){.btn .btn-primary}

## Tutorials

The tutorials below are local rendered copies of the Jupyter notebooks from the `ML4BM-Lab/SimiCPipeline` repository. They are rendered without executing code during website publication.

::: {.tutorial-grid}

::: {.tutorial-card .pipeline-card}
### Full Pipeline Tutorial

Complete SimiCPipeline walkthrough, including initialization, parameter configuration, GRN inference, RAS calculation, and downstream result inspection.

[Open tutorial](tutorials/simicpipeline/Tutorial_SimiCPipeline_full.html){.btn .btn-primary}
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="tutorials/simicpipeline/downloads/Tutorial_SimiCPipeline_full.ipynb" download>Download notebook</a>
:::

::: {.tutorial-card .pipeline-card}
### Preprocessing Tutorial

Notebook covering data preparation steps for SimiCPipeline inputs, including expression data, transcription factor lists, and phenotype labels.

[Open tutorial](tutorials/simicpipeline/Tutorial_SimiCPipeline_preprocessing.html){.btn .btn-primary}
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="tutorials/simicpipeline/downloads/Tutorial_SimiCPipeline_preprocessing.ipynb" download>Download notebook</a>
:::

::: {.tutorial-card .pipeline-card}
### Visualization Tutorial

Notebook focused on inspecting and visualizing SimiCPipeline outputs after GRN inference and RAS calculation.

[Open tutorial](tutorials/simicpipeline/Tutorial_SimiCPipeline_visualization.html){.btn .btn-primary}
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="tutorials/simicpipeline/downloads/Tutorial_SimiCPipeline_visualization.ipynb" download>Download notebook</a>
:::

:::

## Helper Scripts

These reference scripts are copied from the SimiCPipeline notebook folder.

- [run_preprocessing.py](tutorials/simicpipeline/run_preprocessing.py)
- [run_simicpipeline.py](tutorials/simicpipeline/run_simicpipeline.py)
